name: Skillet-Sizzled Buttermilk Cornbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine the cornmeal, flour, baking powder, and salt.
3. In a small bowl, stir the baking soda into the buttermilk.
4. In a second bowl, whisk together the egg, sugar to taste, oil, and then whisk in the buttermilk.
5. Spray an 8-9 inch cast-iron skillet with vegetable cooking spray.
6. Put the skillet over medium-high heat, add butter, and heat until the butter melts and is just starting to sizzle. Tilt the pan to coat the bottom and sides.
7. Add the wet ingredients to the dry mixture and stir using only as many strokes as needed to combine.
8. Scrape the batter into the hot, buttery skillet.
9. Immediately put the skillet in the oven and bake until golden brown, about 25 minutes.
10. Cut into wedges to serve.
